title: Bridge Essay: Intrinsic neural timescales exhibit different lengths in distinct meditation techniques.
concept: Mantra — inner speech, focused attention meditation, chanting neural effects.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Language/Mantra** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Mantra — inner speech, focused attention meditation, chanting neural effects.

**Intrinsic neural timescales exhibit different lengths in distinct meditation techniques.** - Neuroimage (2024). DOI: 10.1016/j.neuroimage.2024.120745. PMID: 39069224. Meditation encompasses a range of practices employing diverse induction techniques, each characterized by a distinct attentional focus. In Mantra meditation, for instance, practitioners direct their attention narrowly to a given sentence that is recursively repeated, while other forms of meditation such as Shoonya meditation are induced by a wider attentional focus.
